description: Sector overlay for French manufacturing, industrial processing, product safety, CE marking, quality assurance, consumer-product conformity, and industrial-site documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Manufacturing. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: DGCCRF product safety and General Product Safety Regulation materials

rules.title: CE marking and declaration-of-conformity evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for CE marking, EU declaration of conformity, technical file, notified body, or essential safety requirements evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Product-safety and risk-assessment evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for product safety, risk assessment, warnings, instructions, traceability, recall, withdrawal, or market-surveillance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: ICPE classification or environmental authorization evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for ICPE declaration, registration, authorization, Seveso, IED, or classified-installation evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Manufacturing quality-control or production-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for quality assurance, production control, batch records, inspection, test report, non-conformity, or corrective-action evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: DGCCRF product conformity and machinery-control guidance
